name: "TH1 E1 — Workspace and CLI Foundation"
about: "Implement TH1.E1 Workspace and CLI Foundation"

---

- [ ] US1 — Initialize a repo-scoped graph workspace: bootstrap the repo-local `.graph/` workspace and idempotent `graph init`.
- [ ] US2 — Add a chainable command surface and repo discovery: expose the MVP commands with repo-aware resolution and stdin support.
- [ ] US3 — Define and validate the native graph payload contract: enforce the versioned JSON envelope and provenance validation.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH1-cognitive-graph-engine-mvp/epics/E1-workspace-cli-foundation/stories/`
